languages.original_text: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

languages.text: "Рабочий производит или обрабатывает ресурс, солдат уничтожает врагов, губернатор обеспечивает порядок и поставку десятины. Смысл моей жизни — продвигать Поиск Знаний, выполняя свою функцию, дарованную мне Омниссией. Как я и говорил, весьма банальный вопрос".

"The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

languages.text: «El trabajador produce o procesa un recurso, el soldado destruye enemigos, el gobernador asegura el orden y el envío del diezmo. El sentido de mi vida es progresar en la búsqueda del conocimiento, cumpliendo así la función que me ha otorgado el Omnissiah. Como he dicho, es una pregunta totalmente carente de originalidad».
languages.original_text: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

traits.locale_text: «El trabajador produce o procesa un recurso, el soldado destruye enemigos, el gobernador asegura el orden y el envío del diezmo. El sentido de mi vida es progresar en la búsqueda del conocimiento, cumpliendo así la función que me ha otorgado el Omnissiah. Como he dicho, es una pregunta totalmente carente de originalidad».

languages.text: “工人生产或加工资源，士兵消灭敌人，总督维持秩序并确保什一税的运送。而我生命的意义在于推进求知远征，从而履行欧姆尼赛亚赐予我的职能。正如我所说，这个问题没什么新意。”
languages.original_text: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

traits.locale_text: “工人生产或加工资源，士兵消灭敌人，总督维持秩序并确保什一税的运送。而我生命的意义在于推进求知远征，从而履行欧姆尼赛亚赐予我的职能。正如我所说，这个问题没什么新意。”

languages.text: « L'ouvrier produit ou traite une ressource, le soldat détruit l'ennemi, le gouverneur assure l'ordre et la bonne expédition des dîmes. Le sens de ma vie, c'est de faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance et ainsi de remplir la fonction qui m'a été accordée par l'Omnimessie. Comme je le disais, c'est une question des plus banales. »
languages.original_text: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

traits.locale_text: « L'ouvrier produit ou traite une ressource, le soldat détruit l'ennemi, le gouverneur assure l'ordre et la bonne expédition des dîmes. Le sens de ma vie, c'est de faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance et ainsi de remplir la fonction qui m'a été accordée par l'Omnimessie. Comme je le disais, c'est une question des plus banales. »

languages.text: "Der Arbeiter produziert oder verarbeitet eine Ressource, der Soldat vernichtet Feinde, der Gouverneur sorgt für Ordnung und die Entrichtung des Zehnts. Der Sinn meines Lebens ist die Suche nach Wissen, um die Funktion zu erfüllen, die mir der Omnissiah gewährt hat. Wie gesagt, eine wenig originelle Frage."
languages.original_text: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

traits.locale_text: "Der Arbeiter produziert oder verarbeitet eine Ressource, der Soldat vernichtet Feinde, der Gouverneur sorgt für Ordnung und die Entrichtung des Zehnts. Der Sinn meines Lebens ist die Suche nach Wissen, um die Funktion zu erfüllen, die mir der Omnissiah gewährt hat. Wie gesagt, eine wenig originelle Frage."

languages.text: 「労働者は資源を生産・加工し、兵士は敵を殲滅し、総督は秩序と什分の一の出荷を保証する。私の人生の意義は、知識の探求を進めることであり、それによって全知全能の神から与えられた機能を果たすことである。申し上げたように、まったく独創性のない質問です」。
languages.original_text: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

languages.text: "İşçi bir kaynak üretir veya işler, asker düşmanları yok eder, vali düzeni ve aşarın sevkiyatını sağlar. Hayatımın anlamı, İrfan Arayışı'nı ilerletmek ve böylece Hermesih'in bana bahşettiği işlevi yerine getirmektir. Dediğim gibi... Son derece sıradan bir soru."
languages.original_text: "The worker produces or processes a resource, the soldier destroys enemies, the governor ensures order and the shipment of tithes. The meaning of my life is to advance the Quest for Knowledge, thus fulfilling the function granted to me by the Omnissiah. As I said, an utterly unoriginal question."

traits.locale_text: "İşçi bir kaynak üretir veya işler, asker düşmanları yok eder, vali düzeni ve aşarın sevkiyatını sağlar. Hayatımın anlamı, İrfan Arayışı'nı ilerletmek ve böylece Hermesih'in bana bahşettiği işlevi yerine getirmektir. Dediğim gibi... Son derece sıradan bir soru."
